verses.text: After Moses' death, God bids Joshua arise and cross Jordan. The charge. The work goes on under a new leader.
After Moses' death, God bids Joshua arise and cross Jordan. The charge. The work goes on under a new leader.
Every place your foot treads is given; none shall stand before you. The promise. God grants the land.
Every place your foot treads is given; none shall stand before you. The promise. God grants the land.
Every place your foot treads is given; none shall stand before you. The promise. God grants the land.
'Be strong and of a good courage'; obey all the law. Courage. Strength comes through obedience.
'Be strong and of a good courage'; obey all the law. Courage. Strength comes through obedience.
Meditate in the law day and night; 'be not afraid... the LORD... is with thee.' The book. God's word and presence give success.
Meditate in the law day and night; 'be not afraid... the LORD... is with thee.' The book. God's word and presence give success.
Joshua bids the officers prepare to pass over in three days. Prepare. The advance begins.
Joshua bids the officers prepare to pass over in three days. Prepare. The advance begins.
He reminds the eastern tribes to go armed before their brethren. The pledge. They keep their word.
He reminds the eastern tribes to go armed before their brethren. The pledge. They keep their word.
He reminds the eastern tribes to go armed before their brethren. The pledge. They keep their word.
He reminds the eastern tribes to go armed before their brethren. The pledge. They keep their word.
The people promise to obey him as they obeyed Moses. Obedience. They rally to their leader.
